回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 經濟學(二) (Economics II)	開課班級 : 邊境四	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 卓正中	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
Students will gain a working knowledge of: 1.Enhance students’ macroeconomic concepts including GDP, unemployment, inflation and the CPI, aggregate expenditure, long run economic growth, business cycle fluctuations, monetary and fiscal policy 2.Develop mathematical models of the aggregate economy and then be able to apply these mathematical models 3.Improve logic and deductive reasoning skills 4.Relate real world events to our study of macroeconomics  


2.教學綱要
Economics is the study of the production, allocation, and distribution of goods and services in a world where resources are scarce. This course introduces students to the measurement and behavior of key macroeconomic variables both in Canada and around the world. Topics include national accounts, inflation, interest rates, wages, international balance of payments, business cycles, growth, employment, unemployment, poverty, and inequality. 


3.教科書
1	書名 : PRINCIPLES OF ECONOMICS　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : FRANK/BERNANKE　出版社 : 華泰文化　版本 : FOURTH EDITION(ISBN:9781260597981)

6.成績評定及課堂要求
1. Attendence: 25% 2. Course Performance: 15% 3. Midterm: 30% 4. Final Exam: 30% 
Don't swipe your phone during class
